spec.long_desc: A heavy-bodied boar roots in the damp earth, its curved tusks caked with mud.
spec.detailed_desc: A broad, low-slung animal with a coarse grey-black bristle coat and small, angry eyes. The tusks are old and yellowed but still sharp. It does not flee at your approach; it has apparently decided that this section of hollow is its territory and you are an infringement.
